overall.description: First-person walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), moving under massive transit overpasses and along wet neon-lit streets. The clip features iconic megastructures, digital billboards, and transitions between covered walkways and open urban intersections.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete transit overpass with red and white construction barriers lining the left side. Digital billboards hang overhead displaying advertisements, while the wet pavement reflects the mixed natural and artificial lighting. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the covered urban corridor.

events.description: exits covered overpass into open intersection with view of spiral megatower
crosses the multi-lane street toward the sidewalk near the megatower

agents.ego_description: exiting the overpass and crossing the wet street toward the towering megastructure

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: iconic cylindrical megatower with spiral architecture and multiple levels
elevated glass pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a bright open intersection dominated by a massive spiral megatower. The camera crosses the wet asphalt street as vehicles pass by, with the glass-enclosed pedestrian walkway visible ahead. The scene transitions from sheltered mixed lighting to full natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with megatower and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk parallel to the street, passing palm trees and commercial storefronts

tall palm trees lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open commercial sidewalk with the spiral megatower receding to the left. The street features holographic billboards, palm trees, and futuristic vehicles passing by. The camera approaches a distinctive yellow-structured overpass ahead while passing an orange commercial building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with yellow structural beams and food kiosk

events.description: enters covered walkway with distinctive yellow steel beam architecture

agents.ego_description: walking under the yellow-beamed overpass, passing a turquoise food kiosk on the left

notable_agents.action: person standing at the turquoise food kiosk window

entered.detail: small turquoise and orange food stand with 'OPEN' neon sign and menu displays
commercial shops with glowing purple and yellow signage

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway characterized by prominent yellow structural steel beams overhead. A turquoise food kiosk with neon signage sits on the left while the camera moves through the sheltered corridor. The environment shifts from open sky to partial cover with artificial lighting supplementing the natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial promenade with palm trees

events.description: exits yellow overpass into open pedestrian promenade

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area with palm trees and commercial buildings on both sides

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian promenade with clear sky overhead
contemporary storefronts with large glass windows and signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into a bright open plaza lined with palm trees and modern commercial buildings. The scene returns to full natural lighting with clear skies, featuring a wide pedestrian promenade and contemporary storefronts on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city, transitioning from sheltered urban corridors into bright, open plazas. It begins under a massive concrete transit overpass lined with construction barriers and digital billboards, where wet pavement reflects a mix of artificial and natural light. As the camera emerges from this covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection dominated by a massive spiral megatower and bustling traffic. The movement then continues along a commercial sidewalk past holographic displays and palm trees before turning into another sheltered passage defined by yellow structural steel beams and a neon-lit turquoise food kiosk. Finally, the camera exits this corridor into a wide, bright pedestrian promenade lined with modern storefronts and palm trees under a clear sky.
